negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_233
prompt: A dynamic boxing training session unfolds in a dimly lit gym, illuminated by overhead fluorescent lights. The main subject, a focused young man, is actively engaged in a punching routine using a Fairtex punching bag. He wears a black and green long-sleeve shirt, black shorts, red padding, and white boxing gloves, demonstrating controlled and precise punches. The Fairtex bag, prominently displayed in the center, is yellow with black accents and bears the Fairtex logo. In the background, another individual, dressed in a black tank top and red shorts, stands near the corner of the boxing ring, observing the training attentively. The gym's environment includes two other punching bags, one red and black, hanging in the background. The scene captures the intensity and precision of the boxer's technique, with the observer's attentive stance adding to the focused atmosphere. A medium shot from a slightly elevated perspective.
